ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of production */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Locale of the vehicle */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Body style of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_locale FOREIGN KEY ("locale") REFERENCES locales ("locale_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Code of the color */,
  "color_type" TEXT /* Type of the color (e.g., metallic, non-metallic) */,
  "rgb_value" TEXT /* RGB value of the color */,
  "hex_value" TEXT /* Hexadecimal value of the color */,
  "manufacturer_code" TEXT /* Manufacturer's code for the color */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the color (e.g., yes, no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colors_color_type FOREIGN KEY ("color_type") REFERENCES color_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_colors" (
  "vehicle_color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle-color combination */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color */,
  "availability_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the color became available for the vehicle */,
  "availability_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the color will no longer be available for the vehicle */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the color option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_colors_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_colors_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locales" (
  "locale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each locale */,
  "locale_name" TEXT /* Name of the locale */,
  "locale_code" TEXT /* Code of the locale */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* ISO language code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("locale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of production */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the production year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the production year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the color type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the color type */,
  "is_customizable" TEXT /* Indicates whether the color type is customizable (e.g., yes, no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production year */,
  "locale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the locale */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was produced */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles produced in that batch */,
  "production_line" TEXT /* Production line where the vehicle was produced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_production_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES production_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_production_locale_id FOREIGN KEY ("locale_id") REFERENCES locales ("locale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_production_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color usage record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production year */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the color was used for the vehicle in that production year */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* Last date the color was used for the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_usage_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_usage_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
